content.memory: The user asked the AI how to choose a mechanical keyboard suitable for gaming. The AI explained the difference between linear switches and tactile switches, and suggested choosing brands according to budget, such as ROG, Corsair, or Keychron.

The user said he had been watching the anime Hell's Paradise recently, and the art style and battles were excellent. The AI said the work had a unique setting, and the partnership between Sajo and Gabimaru was very interesting.

The user told the AI that he broke through 80 kilograms in bench press at the gym today; it was tough but he made it. The AI congratulated him and reminded him to pay attention to protection, preferably with a spotter.
The user said he had been watching Spy x Family Season 2 recently, and the interaction between Twilight and Yor was lovely. The AI said the warm daily life of the work was the biggest highlight.
The user consulted the AI on how to choose a 3D printer suitable for beginners. The AI recommended Bambu Lab A1 mini, which was easy to use with high printing quality, ideal for entry-level users.

The user said he had been watching Jujutsu Kaisen Season 2 recently, and Gojo's past arc was heartbreaking. The AI replied that this part of the plot was the climax of the original work, the anime production was well-done, and looked forward to the follow-up.

The user told the AI that he had completed his first PR for an open-source project and it had been merged, feeling a strong sense of accomplishment. The AI congratulated him, saying participating in open source could improve technical influence, and suggested continuing to contribute.

The user asked the AI how to choose a monitor suitable for programming. The AI recommended 4K resolution, 27 inches or larger, IPS panel, eye protection function and bracket adjustment were also important.

The user told the AI that he tried power cleans at the gym today, but his movements were not very skilled. The AI suggested practicing with an empty bar first, learning the force sequence, and paying attention to wrist protection.

The user said he had been playing League of Legends recently, kept losing, and was frustrated. The AI suggested he put it aside temporarily, adjust his mindset, or switch to the ARAM entertainment mode, as games were meant for fun.

The user told the AI that he wrote a Python script today to automatically organize desktop files, which saved a lot of time. The AI praised him for applying what he learned and suggested adding exception handling and logging to make the script more robust.

The user said he had been learning to make shengjian buns recently, but the bottom was not crispy enough. The AI suggested using a flat pan with oil and water to fry, sprinkling sesame seeds and green onions at the end, and serving when the bottom was golden.

The user asked the AI how to remove sweat odor from shoes. The AI suggested sprinkling baking soda in the shoes and leaving it overnight, or using activated carbon packs, and wearing pure cotton breathable socks.

The user said he had been watching the anime Reign of the Seven Spellblades recently, and the setting was very appealing. The AI said the magic combat design in this work was unique and the world view was vast.

The user consulted the AI on how to apply for his own domain name to build a personal blog. The AI recommended registering on Namesilo or GoDaddy, managing DNS with Cloudflare, and deploying to GitHub Pages.

The user said he had been learning to make curry and wanted to achieve the rich taste of Japanese curry shops. The AI suggested adding apple puree and honey to curry roux, frying onions and meat until fragrant, and simmering for enough time.

The user asked the AI what to do if the refrigerator compartment froze up. The AI analyzed that it might be due to aging door seals or a faulty thermostat, suggesting cleaning the drain hole and checking the sealing performance.

The user told the AI that he refactored his personal blog with Next.js today, and the SSG and ISR functions were very useful. The AI praised him for keeping up with cutting-edge technologies and said the Vercel deployment experience was excellent.
The user asked the AI how to choose an entry-level spinning bike APP. The AI recommended Zwift and Peloton, which had rich virtual riding and course content and could increase exercise fun.

The user asked the AI how to choose an entry-level electric toothbrush. The AI recommended rotary and sonic types, suggested paying attention to brush head cost, battery life, and cleaning modes, and emphasized that the Bass brushing method was more important.

The user asked the AI how to choose a Bluetooth speaker suitable for outdoor use. The AI recommended paying attention to waterproof and dustproof rating, battery life and volume; outdoor series from JBL and Bose had good reputations.

The user said he had been watching the anime Undead Unluck recently, and the setting was very creative. The AI said the ability system in this work was interesting, and the interaction between the male and female leads was cute.

The user asked the AI how to relieve tennis elbow pain after playing tennis. The AI suggested ice compress and rest, strengthening forearm muscle strength, using protective gear, and seeking medical attention if severe.

The user told the AI that he had used ChatGPT to write a weekly report today, revised it and sent it to his leader, and was praised. The AI said AI tools could improve efficiency, but personal adjustments should be made to avoid direct copying.

The user taught the casting rules for the nature magic "Seed of Life" in Azeroth. The prerequisites are the Druid class, Exalted reputation with the Cenarion Circle, and completion of the Archdruid trial in Moonglade; the core effect is planting a seed of life on the target, which blooms when the target receives healing, restoring an additional amount equal to 15% of the target's maximum health, lasting for 30 seconds; applicable to sustained raid healing and keeping the tank alive during high-pressure phases.

The user said he had been practicing back extensions recently and felt soreness in his lower back. The AI suggested adjusting the height of the Roman chair, not overextending the movement, and avoiding excessive lumbar arching.
The user asked the AI how to implement simple stock data crawling and visualization with Python. The AI recommended using yfinance to obtain data, and matplotlib and plotly to draw K-line charts.

The user taught the casting rules for the nature magic "Seed of Life" in Azeroth. The prerequisites are the Druid class, Exalted reputation with the Cenarion Circle, and completion of the Archdruid trial in Moonglade; the core effect is planting a seed of life on the target, which blooms when the target receives healing, restoring an additional amount equal to 20% of the target's maximum health and granting the target a shield that absorbs physical damage, lasting for 30 seconds; applicable to sustained raid healing, keeping the tank alive during high-pressure phases, and physical damage reduction scenarios.

The user told the AI that he sold his old graphics card on a second-hand platform today, getting back 2000 yuan, and the buyer was a personal user. The AI reminded him to take photos as proof before shipping, and pack securely to prevent static electricity.

The user said he had been practicing dumbbell curls recently and felt soreness in his biceps. The AI suggested controlling the eccentric phase without using momentum, and trying hammer curls to stimulate different parts.
